title: Azalea
description: A simple fabric mod to add an Azalea wood set to the game. If Mojang won't do it, then I will.
body:
> # Azalea
## What is this?

Azalea is a simple mod that adds a Azalea wood set for Minecraft. Currently it is only supported on Minecraft 1.20.x running with fabric. It was made because I got tired of Mojang not adding an Azalea wood set so I did it myself. It is my first project so expect some bugs, but please let me know if you like it! Constructive criticism is encouraged.

## Features

 - **Adds various wood blocks which include:**

		  Azalea Planks

		  Azalea Log

		  Azalea Wood

		  Stripped Azalea Log

		  Stripped Azalea Wood

		  Azalea Door

		  Azalea Trapdoor

		  Azalea Fence Gate

		  Azalea Fence

		  Azalea Sign

		  Azalea Hanging Sign

  - **Adds Azalea Chest Boat and Azalea Boat.**
